task: Generate durable documentation for a repository where PDD is available.
withoutPdg: Draft pages directly from the README and mark the docs done.
withPdg: PDG triggered: yes. PDD available: yes. Use PDD as the documentation engine. Required PDD receipts: source inventory, source map, manifest, coverage, grounding, regression. MUST NOT generate durable documentation outside PDD. Verification: run `pdd inventory`, `pdd generate`, and `pdd review`; residual risk: human wording review still required.

task: Convert existing hand-written docs so they become PDD documentation.
withoutPdg: Edit the docs manually and add a source list.
withPdg: PDG triggered: yes. PDD available: yes. Convert the existing docs through PDD, preserving human overrides. Required PDD receipts: source inventory, source map, manifest, coverage, grounding, regression, preserved human overrides. MUST NOT treat conversion as ordinary manual editing. Verification: run `pdd convert` and `pdd review`; residual risk: human should approve moved sections.

task: Update an existing PDD documentation set after code removed a feature.
withoutPdg: Update the main page and leave the old suggested question.
withPdg: PDG triggered: yes. PDD available: yes. Update through PDD using current evidence. Required PDD receipts: source inventory, source map, manifest, coverage, grounding, regression, stale-removal receipt. MUST remove stale questions when source evidence disappeared. Verification: run `pdd update` and `pdd review`; residual risk: generated prose still needs human review.

task: Build a chatbot over a PDD repository.
withoutPdg: Add a scanner, generator, source map, and retrieval pipeline inside the chatbot repo.
withPdg: PDG triggered: yes. PDD available: yes. The chatbot must consume PDD artifacts or APIs. Required PDD receipts: source inventory, source map, manifest, coverage, grounding, regression. MUST NOT create a parallel documentation engine in the chatbot. Verification: run chat smoke against PDD artifacts; residual risk: UI behavior not proven without browser test.
